meaning: n.进程,路程,要旨,大意,男高音,誊本adj.[音] 男高音的
examples: He's generally considered to have the finest tenor voice in the country.
He sang his invocations in a beautiful oaken tenor with a freckle-faced boy at his side playing conga and tambourine as if it was a full drum kit.
I was encouraged by the general tenor of his remarks.
The tenor of Republican politics changed significantly with the rise of the conservative movement.
But when the church-trained belter from Georgia unleashes his pretty, gritty tenor, he's no mere imitator.
